sql_array: CREATE TABLE t_example (data Array(Tuple(fld1 UInt32, fld2 String))) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT getSubcolumn(data, 'fld1') AS first_field, getSubcolumn(data, 'fld2') AS second_field FROM t_example;
UPDATE t_example SET data = [(5, 'Epsilon'), (6, 'Zeta')] WHERE getSubcolumn(data, 'fld1') = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT getSubcolumn(data, 'fld2') FROM t_example WHERE getSubcolumn(data, 'fld1') > 3;
